blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,377 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 41°F.
